// about: Copy this to sites/<your-site>/config.json and fill it in. One file per site; everything else (code) is shared.
name: Your Site Name
// name: Public display + meta/title fallback (the live name can still be overridden in the admin panel / D1 site_settings).
// domain: Bare domain, no protocol. Used for canonical/OG/Twitter URLs and the JS meta origin.
// themeColor: Browser UI theme color + PWA theme_color. The in-site palette is set separately in the admin panel (D1 theme_* settings).
// verifiSite: The data-site id for the verifi bot-check embed (verifi.zo0p.dev). Use your own per site.
// cloudflare: Used by deploy.js (Pages project + D1 target) and to generate wrangler.toml for local dev. SECRETS (OAuth client secrets, RESEND_API_KEY, ADMIN_PASSWORD) are NEVER stored here — set them as Cloudflare encrypted secrets per project. Public OAuth client IDs live in the project's env vars too.
